notes: Location acquisition module. acquireLocation() attempts navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition on use (S1.A1/DCA.4/IP2.A1) and always renders a visible, enabled manual text input (S1.A2/IP2.A2). On geolocation denial/unavailable/timeout the manual path stays usable and is focused (S1.A3/S1.A5/IP2.A3). Typed locations resolve to coordinates via OSM Nominatim geocoding. Yields a resolved {lat,lon,label,source} object (S1.A4) via the onResolved callback. fetchWithTimeout gives every network call a hard timeout so the app never hangs. No persistence, no map rendering, no store queries — all per section out_of_scope.
